data.user_prompt: Who offers family therapy and care coordination in Louisville?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response perplexity Who offers family therapy and care coordination in Louisville?

sections.text:
Several providers in Louisville, Kentucky offer **family therapy**, and some also provide **care coordination** (often labeled as case management):

### **Providers Offering Family Therapy + Care Coordination/Case Management**

| Provider | Family Therapy | Care Coordination / Case Management | Notes |
|----------|----------------|--------------------------------------|-------|
| **Haven Family Counseling** (Boys & Girls Haven) | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes (intensive in-home therapy + case management) | Outpatient program serving children, teens, adults, and families; offers in-home and telehealth services [8] |
| **Creative Family Counseling** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes (parent support + matching to therapist) | Offers individual/family counseling and parent support; has Louisville and Prospect campuses [9] |
| **LifeStance Health** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes (multidisciplinary team for personalized support) | 4 in-person locations near Louisville + telehealth; offers compassionate family therapy [4] |
| **Revelation Counseling Center** | ✅ Yes | ❌ Not explicitly stated | LMFT and LCSW therapists; family & couples focus [1] |
| **Innovative Family Therapy** | ✅ Yes | ❌ Not explicitly stated | Focuses on the whole family system; offers couples/marriage/divorce counseling [3] |
| **Steere Family Therapy** | ✅ Yes | ❌ Not explicitly stated | Louisville's Family Therapy Specialists; emphasizes individual/family uniqueness [5] |
| **Brock Family Therapy Center** | ✅ Yes | ❌ Not explicitly stated | Client-based services for personal growth and well-being [6] |
| **Groupworks** | ✅ Yes | ❌ Not explicitly stated | Family psychologists support reconnection and individual growth [7] |

---

### **Top Recommendations for Combined Services**

1. **Haven Family Counseling** – Best for **family therapy + intensive in-home care coordination/case management**, especially for families with children/adolescents [8].
2. **LifeStance Health** – Strong option for **family therapy + multidisciplinary care coordination**, with multiple in-person locations near Louisville [4].
3. **Creative Family Counseling** – Offers **family therapy + parent support/care coordination**, with convenient Louisville and Prospect campuses [9].

---

### **How to Find More Family Therapists**

You can browse additional licensed family therapists in Louisville via **Psychology Today**, filtering by “family therapy” and specialty:  
🔗 [Psychology Today – Family Therapists in Louisville, KY](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/ky/louisville?category=family-therapy) [1]

Let me know if you’d like help contacting any of these providers or checking availability.
